Package index

Building a widget

Compile a vellumplot plot or a raw vellum scene into a self-contained, client-side interactive HTML widget.

as_widget()
Turn a vellum scene (or vellumplot plot) into an interactive widget

Shiny

Output and render bindings for embedding a vellumwidget widget in a Shiny app, plus a proxy for driving a rendered widget from the server.

vellumwidgetOutput() renderVellumwidget()
Shiny bindings for vellumwidget widgets
vellumwidget_proxy()
Drive an already-rendered widget from the Shiny server
vw_select() vw_clear_selection() vw_filter() vw_clear_filter() vw_zoom() vw_reset_zoom()
Proxy verbs: drive a rendered widget from the server

Package

vellumwidget vellumwidget-package
vellumwidget: Interactive Web Widgets for Vellum Scenes

On this page

Developed by David Schoch.
